nodes.label: Note-On Event
nodes.description: Incoming HiseEvent (noteOn) triggers voice start value calculation

nodes.label: Extract Event ID
nodes.description: Gets the 16-bit event ID from the HiseEvent via getEventId()

nodes.label: Event Data Lookup
nodes.description: Hash-table lookup in AdditionalEventStorage using eventId and dataSlot index. Returns (found, value) pair.

nodes.label: Slot Written?
nodes.description: Checks if the storage returned a valid value for this event ID (nv.first == true)

nodes.label: Clamp to [0,1]
nodes.description: Clamps the stored value to [0.0, 1.0] via jlimit

nodes.label: Use DefaultValue
nodes.description: Returns the DefaultValue parameter when the slot was not written for this event

nodes.label: Voice Start Value
nodes.description: Final modulation value stored as voiceValues[voiceIndex], constant for voice lifetime

nodes.label: SlotIndex
nodes.description: Selects which of the 16 event data slots (0-15) to read

nodes.label: DefaultValue
nodes.description: Fallback value (0.0-1.0) when slot has not been written for this event

nodes.label: GlobalRoutingManager
nodes.description: Provides the AdditionalEventStorage. Must exist or modulator logs an error and returns default.

nodes.label: Script setEventData()
nodes.description: Write side: scripts call GlobalRoutingManager.setEventData(eventId, slot, value) to populate slots before note-on
